cookie.title: Cookie Policy — json
cookie.description: Learn how json uses cookies and similar technologies. Understand your rights and manage your preferences.
cookie.s1.title: What Are Cookies?
cookie.s1.intro: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide reporting information, and deliver a better user experience.
cookie.s1.p1: Cookies set by the website owner (json) are called "first-party cookies." Cookies set by parties other than the website owner are called "third-party cookies." Third-party cookies enable third-party features or functionality to be provided on or through the website (e.g., advertising, interactive content, and analytics).
cookie.s1.p2: We use both first-party and third-party cookies. In some cases, we may use cookies to collect personal information, or information that becomes personal information if we combine it with other information.
cookie.s2.title: Why Do We Use Cookies?
cookie.s2.intro: We use cookies for several reasons:
cookie.s2.necessary_desc: These cookies are required for the website to function correctly. They enable core features such as page navigation, language preference, and consent management. They cannot be disabled.
cookie.s2.analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our tools — which pages they visit, how long they stay, and where they come from. This data helps us improve our tools and user experience.
cookie.s2.ads_desc: These cookies are used to deliver relevant advertisements and measure advertising effectiveness. They help prevent the same ad from being shown too many times and ensure ads are properly displayed.
cookie.s3.title: How Can I Control Cookies?
cookie.s3.intro: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. When you first visit our website, you will see a consent banner at the bottom of the screen where you can choose to accept all cookies, reject non-essential cookies, or customize your preferences.
cookie.s3.browser: You can also set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. For more information on how to manage cookies on the most popular browsers, visit the help pages for Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.
cookie.s4.title: Types of Cookies We Use
cookie.s4.intro: The table below describes the specific cookies used on our website:
cookie.table.name: Name
cookie.row.cky_consent: Stores your cookie consent preferences (analytics, ads). Required for compliance.
cookie.row.ga: Used by Google Analytics to distinguish unique visitors and generate anonymized usage statistics.
cookie.row.gid: Used by Google Analytics to distinguish users within a 24-hour period.
cookie.row.gads: Set by Google Ad Manager to measure ad interaction and prevent repetitive ad display.
cookie.s5.title: Do You Serve Targeted Advertising?
cookie.s5.desc: Third parties may serve cookies on your device to serve advertising through our website. These companies may use information about your visits to this and other websites to provide relevant advertisements. They may also employ technology to measure the effectiveness of advertisements. The information collected through this process does not enable us or them to identify your name, contact details, or other details that directly identify you unless you choose to provide these.
cookie.s6.title: How Often Will You Update This Policy?
cookie.s6.desc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. The date at the top of this page indicates when it was last updated. Please revisit this page regularly to stay informed.
cookie.s7.title: Contact Us
cookie.s7.contact: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please contact us at our contact page.
